title: 3 Piece Set Transparent Acrylic Flower Vases, Unbreakable, Shatter-Proof Plastic Cylinder Vases for Flower Arrangement, Mother’s Day, Wedding, Living Room Decor(12x25cm and 10x20cm and 25x15cm)
features: Premium Material: The vase is made of high-quality acrylic material, which is sturdy, durable, non- fragile, and easy to clean. It won't break like glass or ceramics, which is safe and durable. The bottle mouth is polished smooth, with thickened bottom, not easy to shake, without sharp corners overall, making flower arrangement much more stable (Does not include flowers)

Fantastic Cylinder Vases: This Acrylic flower vase is designed for showing off your flowers. The transparent bottle body allows you to vividly see the beauty of flowers or other items inside the vase. Cylinder vase looks beautiful and fashionable, which brings your flowers a beautiful display, and adds elegance to any table or space

Exquisite Home Decoration: The Minimalist Art Decor Vase can nicely fits for kitchen tabletop, living room shelf, office desk and cafe bar. The simple stylish appearance is suitable for all kind home decor such as Nordic and Scandinavian. The flower plastic vase can be a great gift for Christmas, Birthday, Thanksgiving, wedding, anniversary and any other special occasions

Set of Vases: These cylinder vases are 3pcs as a set, with different heights or sizes, to accommodate different fresh flower bouquets or dried floral arrangement. Combined dimensions: Ø 10 cm × H 20 cm, Ø 12 cm × H 25 cm, Ø 15 cm × H 25 cm

The Perfect Gift: This modern flower vase makes a thoughtful present for Mother's Day, birthdays, Thanksgiving, Anniversaries, bridal showers, and housewarmings. Its minimalist design suits any décor — simply fill it with fresh, dried, or faux flowers for instant elegance
description: Product Description Make an impressive moment with this beautiful acrylic Vase! The Acrylic flower vases are made from thickened highly transparent PET, will not shatter like glass or ceramic, easy to mantain. It’s lightweight, shatter-proof, long lasting and easy to take care of, which is ideal for your daily use anytime and anywhere. These cylinder vases are 3pcs as a set, with different heights or sizes, to accommodate different fresh flower bouquets or dried floral arrangement. Colour: Transparent Material: Acrylic Package Contents 1 × Acrylic Round Vase (Ø 10 cm × H 20 cm) 1 × Acrylic Round Vase (Ø 12 cm × H 25 cm) 1 × Acrylic Round Vase (Ø 15 cm × H 25 cm) Smooth openning mouth The bottle neck is smooth and rounded, with a flat surface that is gentle on the hands. Thickened design The heavy base and the round body design makes the vase the most stable and durable for daily flower arrangements. An elegant simple design vase with crystal-clear is ideal for wedding centerpieces, home office decorations, restaurant or flower shop presentations. Brings your flowers a beautiful display. Perfect art decoration for your home, kitchen, dining room, living room, bedroom, office, restaurant, flower shop. This acrylic vase can be decorated with shells, pebbles, glass beads, or rhinestones. You can also layer sea sand or coral at the base, making it suitable for keeping fish. The acrylic flower vase worked great for pampas, roses and tulips, bamboo plant, flowers, hydrangea blooms, cotton balls, faux flower arrangement, amaryllis, gladiolus, decorate with sea shells, sand, rocks, water, beads. Although Acrylic Flower Vases are common, they are the most effective decor for almost all occasions. It is both generous and befitting. Regardless if you are using in wedding events or home decor. It will easily attract attention to its elegance. If you're looking for the perfect gift to crown a Christmas, anniversary, birthday or housewarming holiday, this gorgeous and unique personalised vase will be a hit. It is an ideal gift for family, friends and loved ones.
